lockFileMaintenance.description: pyproject.toml uses unbounded ranges (ansible-core >=2.18 etc.), so Renovate sees nothing to bump while uv.lock keeps exact pins frozen forever â€” silence â‰  up-to-date. A weekly lock refresh PR rides the same CI gate. NO automerge: >= ranges mean a refresh can contain major jumps (ansible-core 3.x one day); those deserve a deliberate look.

customManagers.description: Docker image tags inside Ansible docker-compose Jinja templates (containers/ is generated, so the source of truth is the .j2)

Pinned hook revisions in prek.toml. Renovate's built-in pre-commit manager only scans .pre-commit-config.yaml, not prek.toml, so these (pre-commit-hooks, ansible-lint, gitleaks) would age silently. Match each GitHub repo URL with its adjacent rev tag.

packageRules.description: Watchtower owns mutable :latest tags â€” Renovate manages only version-pinned images, so leave latest alone

Bundle minor + patch image bumps into a single weekly PR to cut noise; majors stay separate so they get a deliberate look. Auto-merge once CI (prek + image-smoke) is green and the release has soaked 7 days (mirrors watchtower's COOLDOWN_DELAY â€” filters fresh upstream breakage); the host health gate is the post-merge safety net.

LinuxServer.io images tag as <upstream-version>-lsNN (e.g. 4.0.17.2952-ls312). Regex versioning both orders these correctly and rejects non-release tags (commit hashes like 438eee94-ls46, nightlies) as invalid, so they're never offered. Optional 4th version part -> build, OS suffix (ubu2404) -> compatibility, -lsNN -> revision.

Keep prek.toml hook bumps in their own weekly group, separate from the container-image group. They match the custom.regex manager, so the non-major auto-merge + 7-day soak rule above already applies; this only overrides the group name. Majors stay manual (no automerge rule matches them).

Meilisearch (karakeep's search index) changes its on-disk DB format between MINOR versions and refuses to boot on an old database; the dumpless-upgrade flag is still experimental with a documented corruption risk, so upgrades are manual (snapshot first, then flag or dump/restore). Own PR + no automerge â€” and kept out of the non-major group so it can't block that bundle's automerge.
packageRules.groupName: meilisearch (manual upgrade â€” DB format migration)
